hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Write-Output '=== BLOCKGRAPH INIT TEMPLATE ACTIVE ==='; Write-Output 'Before initialization, read .claude/skills/blockgraph-init/SKILL.md and confirm the blockgraph MCP server is enabled with /mcp.'; Write-Output 'If resuming after a restart, call begin_initialization or resume_initialization with the target repo path before continuing.'"

powershell -NoProfile -Command "Write-Output '=== BLOCKGRAPH CONTEXT RECOVERY ==='; Write-Output 'Read .claude/skills/blockgraph-init/SKILL.md, then inspect current BlockGraph state with session_status, list_work_packages, list_module_proposals, coverage_report, and quality_gate_report when available.'"
